full_text:
Cheng Zi 程咨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Zi (程咨). Son of Cheng Pu, succeeded his father as marquis. Cheng Zi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
